name: Paradip Port → Bhubaneswar Command Center
description: Primary road link from Paradip Port to the state capital command center via NH-316. Exposed to cyclone flooding and coastal wind damage.

name: Paradip Port → Cuttack Logistics Hub
description: NH-316 freight route from Paradip to Cuttack commercial hub. Critical for cargo redistribution. Vulnerable to flooding in Jagatsinghpur flats.

name: Bhubaneswar Command Center → Cuttack Logistics Hub
description: Short high-frequency urban corridor on NH-16. Backbone link between the state capital and commercial hub. Generally resilient to cyclone disruption.

name: Bhubaneswar Command Center → Puri District Hub
description: NH-316 link to coastal Puri district. High storm-surge risk as it approaches the coast. Critical for pre-landfall evacuation and post-landfall relief.

name: Cuttack Logistics Hub → Balasore District Hub
description: NH-16 north corridor linking Cuttack to Balasore district. Long stretch through coastal plain. Susceptible to flooding from Subarnarekha and Budhabalanga rivers.

name: Cuttack Logistics Hub → Kendrapara District Hub
description: State highway linking Cuttack to low-lying Kendrapara district. Frequent washouts during heavy rain. Last-mile supply route to coastal shelter clusters.

name: Kendrapara District Hub → Paradip Port
description: Direct coastal link between Kendrapara and Paradip. Extremely high cyclone risk — road passes through low-lying delta areas and is typically the first to flood.

name: Cuttack Logistics Hub → Cuttack Rail Hub
description: Short intra-city connector between Cuttack logistics hub and railway junction for intermodal freight transfer.

name: Bhubaneswar Relief Warehouse → AIIMS Bhubaneswar
description: Critical medical supply corridor from state warehouse to AIIMS Bhubaneswar. Must remain unobstructed during mass-casualty events.

name: Cuttack Relief Warehouse → SCB Medical College
description: Short urban medical supply link between Cuttack relief warehouse and SCB Medical College. High priority route during disaster response.

name: Paradip Fuel Depot → Paradip Port
description: Port access road between IOCL fuel depot and Paradip Port berths. Critical for fuelling vessels and emergency generators. At extreme risk during cyclone landfall.

name: NDRF / ODRAF Base → Puri District Hub
description: Emergency rapid-deployment route from NDRF base to coastal Puri. Used for pre-landfall team positioning and post-landfall search and rescue operations.

name: NDRF / ODRAF Base → Balasore District Hub
description: Long north-corridor emergency deployment to Balasore. Typically combined with rail movement of heavy equipment for efficiency.

name: NDRF / ODRAF Base → Kendrapara District Hub
description: Emergency route to low-lying Kendrapara. Involves river crossings at Mahanadi delta system. High disruption probability during storm surge.

name: Bhubaneswar Airport → Cuttack Rail Hub (Rail)
description: East Coast Railway link between Bhubaneswar and Cuttack Junction. Lower carbon and higher capacity than road for bulk relief freight.

name: Cuttack Rail Hub → Balasore District Hub (Rail)
description: Rail freight and passenger link to northern Odisha. Partially elevated on embankments, giving better flood resilience than road. Currently delayed due to track inspection.

name: Bhubaneswar Command Center → Ganjam Relief Hub
description: Southern route to Ganjam district via NH-16 through Berhampur. Required for pre-positioning supplies ahead of south-track cyclone systems.

name: Jagatsinghpur District Hub → Paradip Port
description: Short direct link from Jagatsinghpur district administration to Paradip Port for rapid logistics coordination. Cyclone risk mirrors the port risk profile.

name: Coastal Cyclone Shelters → Puri District Hub
description: Evacuation and supply corridor between the coastal shelter cluster and Puri district administration. Critical for last-mile supply to sheltered populations.

name: Coastal Cyclone Shelters → Kendrapara District Hub
description: Critical coastal evacuation supply link currently blocked by storm surge inundation. Boat transport being activated as alternate.

name: Dhamra Port → Cuttack Logistics Hub
description: Alternative freight corridor from Dhamra deep-water port to Cuttack. Activated when Paradip operations are disrupted. NH-49 inland routing avoids the most exposed coastal zone.

name: Dhamra Port → Balasore District Hub
description: Short link from Dhamra to Balasore. Important for northern Odisha supply redistribution when Paradip-Cuttack routes are compromised.

name: Bhubaneswar Command Center → Bhubaneswar Relief Warehouse
description: Urban connector between the state command center and Bhubaneswar relief warehouse. Enables medical and relief dispatch toward AIIMS Bhubaneswar.

name: Cuttack Logistics Hub → Cuttack Relief Warehouse
description: Urban connector between the Cuttack logistics hub and relief warehouse. Keeps medical supply movement to SCB Medical Cuttack inside the route graph.
